work_unit: H-001 /ws/xiaozhi WebSocket endpoint missing token authentication
situation: audit-2026-07-06-021 deep audit found /ws/xiaozhi endpoint (api.py:194) calls xiaozhi_server.xiaozhi_endpoint(ws) directly without any auth check, while sibling endpoints /ws/live and /ws/audio both call auth.verify_ws_token(ws) and close(1008) on failure. Unauthenticated clients can connect to the xiaozhi device relay, inject audio/commands, and exfiltrate ASR/TTS data.
action: Added verify_ws_token guard at top of ws_xiaozhi handler, matching pattern used by ws_live and ws_audio. When PA_API_TOKEN is configured, unauthenticated connections are rejected with WebSocket close code 1008. When no token is configured (dev mode), verify_ws_token returns True per existing is_auth_enabled() semantics — preserving localhost dev workflow.
outcome_evidence: git log opt-ws-auth-1783338961 shows commit 48555aa with the verify_ws_token guard added; branch pushed to origin/auto/opt-ws-auth-1783338961; main checkout clean (no residual diff). Pattern identical to ws_live (line 131) and ws_audio (line 175).
next_suggestion: 派生 H-002 (CORS wildcard + dev-mode auth bypass) fix，同样 route-fix，area=ws-auth 或 api:cors-hardening（已有 worktree opt-api-1783193708 含 CORS 重构但方向分歧大，可能需新 wt）

audit_findings.finding: /ws/xiaozhi endpoint has no authentication check — any network client can connect and interact with the xiaozhi device relay (ASR/TTS/command injection)
audit_findings.remediation: Add auth.verify_ws_token(ws) guard before xiaozhi_endpoint call, close(1008) on failure
